prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-BEEDBK-2PC Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Collectible Black Eagle Etched Knife Description: The Collectible Black Eagle Knife with Sheath would be a great addition to any knife-collector's collection. The blade of the knife is 7" in length and is made from strong 440 Stainless Steel. The total knife length is 13.75" from point to pommel.

The blade itself has a great acid etched design to give it style. The scabbard features a beautifully colored picture of a flying eagle while the pommel of the knife is a eagle head. Search Terms: knife collectors ornate knives black eagle etched dagger Features: - 7" Acid Etched Stainless Steel Blade - Intricately Detailed Cast Metal Guard - Cast Metal Eagle Head Pommel - Full Color Scabbard and Handle Graphic - 13.75" Inch Overall Length === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 13.75in Black Eagle Etched Knife

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7" Black Eagle Etched Collectible Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: 7In 440 Stainless Steel Blade, Acid Etched Design, Eagle Head Pommel, Full Color Scabbard, Collector's Knife

openai.title_differentiation: 7" Acid Etched 440 Stainless Steel Blade, Cast Metal Eagle Head Pommel, Detailed Guard, Full Color Sheath, 1375" Overall Length
